nav.fileflexWebHint: Use it now in your browser.

hero.badge: {count} free tools · no signup · no uploads
hero.title: EVERY FILE. EVERY FORMAT. FREE.
hero.subtitle: Convert, compress, protect, and clean any file — right in your browser.
hero.filesProcessed: {count} files processed by people like you

home.allToolsDesc: {count} tools across PDF, images, office and utilities — all free and private.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you might want to know about privacy and how it works.

faq.q1: Are my files uploaded to a server?
faq.a1: No. Every FileFlex tool runs entirely in your browser. Your files are read locally and processed on your device — they are never sent to any server.
faq.a2: Yes. All tools are free with no signup, no watermarks and no limits. Supported by optional ads you can decline.
faq.q3: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a3: No installation required. FileFlex works in any modern browser on desktop or mobile.
faq.a4: PDF tools support standard PDF files. Image tools handle JPG, PNG, WebP and HEIC. Office tools support .docx, .xlsx and .csv.
faq.a5: Once the page is loaded, processing happens locally so your file operations don't need a network connection.
faq.a6: FileFlex does not track your files or their contents. We may use privacy-friendly analytics and ads only if you accept cookies.
faq.q7: Can I use FileFlex on mobile?
faq.a7: Yes. The interface is mobile-first and fully responsive. All tools work on phones and tablets.

pdf-merge.name: Merge PDF

pdf-split.desc: Split a PDF into pages or ranges.

pdf-compress.name: Compress PDF
pdf-compress.desc: Reduce PDF size by downsampling images.

pdf-rotate.desc: Rotate all pages of a PDF.

pdf-delete-pages.desc: Remove unwanted pages from a PDF.

pdf-to-jpg.name: PDF to JPG
pdf-to-jpg.desc: Convert each PDF page to JPG/PNG.

pdf-extract-text.name: Extract Text from PDF

pdf-unlock.name: PDF Unlock

pdf-add-watermark.name: PDF Watermark
